span.p:
Source: Sub 4 detection consumer
or stateless_engine.evaluate_stateless()
Rule IDs: C-001 through C-502
Severity: low | medium | high | critical

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Tier 1: Stateless\nSingle payload scoring\nNo DB lookups

span.p: Suppressed\nRule evaluated, no alert\nThreshold not met

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fields: id, rule_id, name, severity,
category, merchant_id, employee_id,
location_id, amount_cents, details,
fired_at, source (stateless|stateful)

Dismissed
alert_history: status=dismissed
Excluded from risk scoring
Reason recorded

GRO-245: create_case_from_context()
Links alert_id to fox_cases.id
via fox_case_alerts junction table
Multiple alerts can link to one case
